title: 062  Can Srila Prabhupada answer your letter
speaker: HDG Srila Prabhupada

segments.text: Actually, in 1969, one devotee asked Prabhupada the question, what happened after the spiritual
master departs, because spiritual master, he says, he will deliver all the disciples.
Prabhupada said, I remain in the universe as long as all my disciples are not delivered.
So this idea that Guru is dead and gone, this is Gnastika.
You all of you know Hindi or Sanskrit, some Sanskrit, not Gnastika, that means this is
Some time ago, we had some disputation with some of our brothers in San Diego, California
in 1990, and one of such less intelligent people says, oh, why don't you send a letter
to Prabhupada and tell us what he replies.
Actually, this is Aparaj, but the reason we are repeating this is, first of all, that
was made directly in front of Aditya Prabhupada, which just shows the ignorance of the people.
So my reply is basically, I'm not going to tell you anything, I'm not going to tell you
I say, well, why don't you offer Krishna some prasadam, and after 15 minutes, why don't
you see if it's still there?
So if it's still there, do you conclude there's no Krishna?
So all these arguments about living, this is actually due to a poor fund of knowledge.
